title: EZWireless
description: A simple, lightweight wireless redstone mod.
body:
# EZWireless
## A simple, lightweight wireless redstone mod.

EZWireless is a simple, lightweight wireless redstone mod. The mod adds two blocks, the Transmitter and the Receiver. You can right click on each of these to set which channel they're on, and all Receivers on a certain channel will output a power level of 15 if at least one Transmitter is powered. Comparators reading a Receiver will output the power level of the Transmitter on the channel with the highest power. The mod also adds an item called the Wireless Linker, which just simply sets a Transmitter and Receiver pair to a random channel. This is not required to set channels, it's just a convenience tool.

## Screenshots

![A piston door opened with wireless redstone](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/acfb88e744034667d2faaf1603b50d1dc8f1642c.png)

![A Transmitter with a button on top in the foreground with a cube of TNT with a Receiver on top in the background](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/035223886560bc9a2a0dea9874e1465062de65c3.png)

![An example of a comparator reading a Receiver](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fa7bc7ff425be21970215ad8ea3b1bd7a0160b88.png)

## Crafting recipes

Note: If these recipes feel too expensive, you can download a data pack from the Versions tab that makes the recipes listed here much cheaper such that you could obtain them in early-midgame.
